summary: Bundled deterministic consensus-mode merge helper (bash + python) that implements the merge algorithm the skill previously only described prose-style.

algorithm.criteria_union: union of bullet-list PASS criteria per journey
algorithm.conflict_detection: first-3-word subject key; differing tails emit CONFLICT on stderr
algorithm.conflict_resolution: plan A wins; HTML comment annotates the kept line with plan B's version
algorithm.summary_section: ## Merge Summary lists source paths, journey counts (total/unique-A/unique-B/overlap), conflict count

fixture_test.stderr_line: CONFLICT: Checkout / POST /checkout returns 200 on success — plan A says "POST /checkout returns 200 on success", plan B says "POST /checkout returns 201 on success"

skill_md_addition: Added 'Merge helper:' paragraph in Consensus Mode section pointing at scripts/forge-plan-merge.sh with CLI example and pairwise-merge guidance for the 3-perspective case.
